patterns.name: Medium Marketing Shot
patterns.description: Centered subject with slight offset for dynamic balance, ideal for text overlap.
patterns.prompt_injection: Medium shot composition, subject positioned slightly off-center using rule of thirds, clean negative space maintaining visual balance for marketing text elements.

patterns.name: Close Up Detail
patterns.description: Intimate focus on subject's face or product detail.
patterns.prompt_injection: Tight close-up composition, strong subject focus, blurred foreground elements creating depth, balanced framing minimizing visual clutter.

patterns.name: American Shot
patterns.prompt_injection: American shot composition (cowboy shot), showcasing subject interaction with environment while preserving negative space for layouts.

patterns.name: Vertical Story Layout
patterns.prompt_injection: Vertical 9:16 composition optimized for mobile screens, centered subject, significant clean vertical negative space at top and bottom for UI elements and text.
